[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark blue user-interface screen with a centered question prompt, two status panels, and a large circular placeholder avatar on the left.

Overview:
A graphic interface titled “Whoo?” presents user-related information on a stylized dark background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a rectangular, rounded-corner UI panel containing large text near the top that reads “Whoo?”, a smaller handle-like line beneath it, a gray pill-shaped button reading “FREE USER,” a red-outlined box labeled with a “LIMIT” and a fraction-like value “5/5,” and a teal-outlined box labeled “LEVEL GRUP” showing “Lv 1.” On the left side is a large circular avatar placeholder with two white circular/oval shapes inside it.

Setting:
The background is an abstract dark blue gradient with soft, blurred circular shapes. The interface panel sits centrally with a subtle border and rounded corners, and the overall presentation looks like a static UI/landing screen. No real-world outdoor or indoor setting is shown.

Visual Details:
The color palette is predominantly deep navy and blue. The title text “Whoo?” is white and bold, with a smaller gray line of text under it. The “FREE USER” button is a darker gray pill with light gray text. The left status panel is outlined in red and contains a small red symbol resembling a lightning bolt or arrow, plus white text “LIMIT” and “5/5” beneath it. The right status panel has a teal/green outline with a small teal star-like icon, and white text “LEVEL GRUP” with “Lv 1” below. The avatar area is a light gray circle with a darker gray rim and two white shapes indicating a generic user silhouette. The composition is symmetrical left-to-right, with the avatar on the left and the two bordered panels in the middle-right.

Visible Text:

This image displays a dark-themed profile or account status interface with an avatar placeholder. It shows a “FREE USER” tag along with a limit indicator “5/5” and a level indicator “Lv 1.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
